news.headline: SkinCure Oncology submits GentleBeam™ Image-Guided SRT for FDA approval to treat nonmelanoma skin cancer.
news.summary: In Burr Ridge, Illinois on March 7, 2025, SkinCure Oncology introduced its advanced model for administering Image-Guided Superficial Radiation Therapy (Image-Guided SRT or IGSRT) aimed at treating nonmelanoma skin cancer. This innovative approach was presented to dermatology patients as part of SkinCure Oncology's commitment to being a global leader in this field.

news.headline: Monday FX Options Expiries
Fed should hold off, economy is strong, says Powell.
Fed Chair Powell stresses patience amid market uncertainty and trade turmoil, emphasizing no urgent rate adjustments needed. US economy stable.
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is proceeding cautiously, evaluating the effects of President Trump's changing trade strategies on the economy before changing monetary policy. At a University of Chicago event on Friday, Powell confirmed that the U.S. economy is steady, despite market turbulence. He stated that the central bank is not planning to modify interest rates abruptly, pending further clarity. This measured approach comes as evolving trade policies lead to economic uncertainty. Powell stressed the need for patience, indicating there is no rush to make adjustments. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sam Bankman-Fried seeks pardon for 25-year sentence for FTX crypto exchange fraud, lobbies Trump allies.
news.summary: Efforts are being made by Mr. Bankman-Fried's family and supporters to assist him in evading a 25-year jail term for his involvement in fraud linked to the failure of his cryptocurrency platform, FTX.

news.headline: Employers added 151,000 jobs in February despite looming impact of federal cutbacks and tariffs.
news.summary: In February, employers in the United States added 151,000 jobs according to the Labor Department. This data was collected during a time when the Trump administration's policies were being implemented.

news.headline: AI startup Anysphere in talks for close to $10 bln valuation
Accuride emerges from restructuring, Geoff Bruce appointed interim CEO, replacing Robin Kendrick. Focus on North American wheels segment.
news.summary: Accuride Corporation is strategically positioned for sustained growth, with a strong emphasis on its core North American wheels segment. Geoff Bruce has been named the Interim CEO, taking over from Robin Kendrick, who will now serve as a director on Accuride's revamped Board. The developments were announced in Livonia, Michigan on March 7, 2025. This move signifies the company's commitment to enhancing its operations and pursuing long-term success in the industry.

news.headline: 3D Marketing & Services, LLC partners with RADIUM LIMITED to strengthen global client base with branding & PR solutions.
news.summary: A well-established digital marketing agency, 3D Marketing & Services, LLC, based in Jackson, Mississippi, has made significant strides in enhancing its global partnerships through the implementation of strategic branding and public relations solutions. The agency recently disclosed its collaboration with RADIUM, a move that intends to further strengthen their position in the market. This announcement was made on March 7, 2025. 3D Marketing & Services, LLC specializes in comprehensive digital marketing and media distribution services, catering to a diverse clientele. This new partnership signifies a milestone for the agency, marking its commitment to expansion and innovation in the ever-evolving digital marketing landscape.

news.headline: Financial markets volatile post Trump's win and inauguration. Six SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust stocks returned over 30% since Nov 5, 2024, with Palantir Technologies Inc. leading at 59.91%, from $51.13 to $81.76. Palantir capitalized on AI trends and CEO Alex Karp's support for Elon Musk's efficiency efforts.
news.summary: Since President Donald Trump's election on Nov. 5, 2024, financial markets have experienced volatility, with certain companies thriving under the new administration. Six companies within the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) have shown remarkable growth, boasting returns exceeding 30% as of the same date. Leading the pack is Palantir Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR), which has surged by an impressive 59.91%, skyrocketing from $51.13 to $81.76. Based in Denver, Colorado, the company has achieved an annualized return of over 184%. Palantir has benefited from current AI trends and CEO Alex Karp's alignment with Elon Musk's initiatives for government efficiency, aimed at reducing fraud and misuse of funds. According to Benzinga Edge, the company continues to gain momentum and show strong performance.

news.headline: Trumps plans for a strategic crypto reserve with Bitcoin and possibly Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, and XRP.
news.summary: The discussion surrounding a strategic reserve incorporating Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and potentially other cryptocurrencies has been trending in the cryptocurrency industry. In a recent poll conducted by Benzinga, readers were asked to identify the top cryptocurrencies the White House administration should prioritize for the strategic reserve. The election of Donald Trump as president in 2024 led to surges in multiple cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin reaching record highs. Trump's new Executive Order aims to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve using initial funding from the federal government's Bitcoin holdings, which will not be liquidated. Trump's announcement comes on the heels of a social media update on March 2, where he suggested that the reserve might encompass various cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA), and XRP Token (CRYPTO: XRP). For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices dip before White House crypto summit, Dogecoin shows strength. Bitcoin at $87,839.15 (-0.7%), Ethereum at $2,177.24 (-0.9%), XRP at $2.48 (-4%). Dogecoin up 2.7%. Large transactions up by 19.5%, daily active addresses by 10.9%. Exchanges netflows down 154%. 157,406 traders liquidated, losing $577.04 million. Darknet market transfers $77.5 million BTC.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is seeing declines ahead of the highly-anticipated White House crypto summit, with Bitcoin at $87,839.15 (-0.7%), Ethereum at $2,177.24 (-0.9%), Solana at $146.27 (+1.8%), XRP at $2.48 (-4%), Dogecoin at $0.2052 (+2.7%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001351 (+1.8%). Notable stats reveal a 19.5% increase in large transaction volume and 10.9% growth in daily active addresses, with transactions above $100,000 rising from 10,490 to 11,093 in a day. Exchanges netflows are down by 154%. Coinglass data indicates 157,406 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $577.04 million. In addition, Arkham intelligence notes the Nucleus Marketplace transferred $77.5 million worth of BTC to three new wallets. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

Lovell says markets lack conviction amid uncertainty.
April 2 deadline to watch for Invesco's Flitton, says Bloomberg analyst.

Powell advises waiting on Fed action as economy remains strong.
Olive Tree People honors 25 women for International Women's Day in Los Angeles on March 8th. Fastest growing waterless beauty brand in America.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Los Angeles, a leading waterless beauty brand in America, Olive Tree People, is recognizing 25 women for International Women's Day on March 8th. This brand celebrates women from its sub-brands LA Dope, Olive Rose, and Olive Mush who have played a crucial role in its growth.

news.headline: Trump: There's no clash between Elon and the Cabinet.
Teamsters at UNFI hold practice pickets in FL, GA, IL, demanding fair contracts. Warn of disruptions. Hundreds participate.
news.summary: Today, hundreds of Teamsters employed at United Natural Foods Inc. (UNFI) conducted practice pickets in Florida, Georgia, and Illinois. They are advocating for fair initial contracts, emphasizing the need for just treatment. The workers are raising concerns about potential disruptions if their demands are not met. This action highlights the importance of addressing the workers' grievances to avoid any interruptions in the company's operations.

news.headline: US aims to acquire BTC through budget-neutral strategies, avoiding taxpayer funds for purchasing assets.
news.summary: Cost-effective strategies involve acquiring assets without the need for additional taxpayer funding to cover the costs of purchases.

news.headline: AllocateRite wins T3 Emerging Technology Award at WealthTech Conference, highlighting their AI wealth platform.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in New York, AllocateRite, a prominent AI wealth platform, has been announced as the recipient of the T3 2025 Emerging Technology Award at the esteemed WealthTech Conference. This recognition signifies a significant achievement for AllocateRite in the finance industry, showcasing their leading role in next-generation technology. The T3 conference is regarded as a prestigious event in the field, highlighting the latest advancements and innovations. This accolade is a testament to AllocateRite's dedication to innovation and excellence, solidifying their position as a top player in the sector.

news.headline: US Consumer Credit Actual 18.084B (Forecast 14.9B, Previous 40.85B)
Trump Organization sues Capital One for closing accounts after Jan. 6 attack, citing consumer protection laws violation.
news.summary: The Trump family business has accused a bank of breaching consumer protection laws for closing its accounts following the Jan. 6 attack. The bank's actions have raised concerns of potential legal repercussions.

news.headline: French president's approval rating rises in poll as concerns over situation in Ukraine grow among citizens.
Brent Crude futures settle at $70.36/bbl, up 90 cents, 1.3%.
UrbanGeekz CEO Kunbi Tinuoye spoke at inaugural Africa Gate to Growth Forum at UC Berkeley Haas School of Business.
news.summary: In a recent event on March 7, 2025, UrbanGeekz founder and CEO Kunbi Tinuoye spoke at the Africa Gate to Growth Forum held at UC Berkeley Haas School of Business. Tinuoye praised the forum for spotlighting the vast opportunities present in the African market. The event saw participation from prominent figures in the industry and academia, promoting discussions on unlocking the region's potential. This significant gathering aimed to address the untapped opportunities for growth in Africa, emphasizing collaboration and innovation. Tinuoye's presence added expertise to the forum, generating valuable insights for the attendees. The event marked a crucial step in highlighting Africa's economic prospects, with attendees engaging in dialogue to explore new avenues for development.

news.headline: Global amino acid assay kit market to reach USD 421.9 million by 2030, growing at 6.6% CAGR, driven by clinical diagnostics and biotech.
news.summary: A report on March 7, 2025, revealed that the global market for amino acid assay kits is expected to experience substantial growth due to rising usage in clinical diagnostics, pharmaceuticals, and biotechnology research. The market is projected to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.6%.

news.headline: Trump team weighs ending the oil price cap if Russia talks progress.
Jennifer Garner's baby food company is considering going public with an IPO this year, according to Bloomberg.
US set to order additional firms to halt operations in Venezuela, escalating pressure on the country.
Crypto industry leaders anticipate White House summit outcomes, as a senior official confirmed tax exclusion on March 7. #RegulationHope
news.summary: On March 7, a statement from a high-ranking White House representative revealed that taxes would not be addressed during the upcoming crypto summit. This decision was met with optimism by certain figures in the industry, who are looking forward to the establishment of a regulatory framework.

news.headline: The US is set to order more companies to stop operating in Venezuela.
The US mulls how to ease Russia energy sanctions if war ends.
Blade Air Mobility opens Q&A platform ahead of fiscal Q4 2024 release, conference call on March 13 at 8:00am ET.
news.summary: Blade Air Mobility, Inc. disclosed the launch of a shareholder Q&A platform for its imminent conference call regarding financial outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year 2024, concluding on December 31. Scheduled for March 13 at 8:00am ET, this call aims to discuss these results. Blade, identified on Nasdaq as BLDE, invites shareholders to participate in this event, marking a significant step in shareholder engagement strategy.

NYMEX Natural Gas April futures settle at $4.3990/MMBtu.
NYMEX Diesel Aprril futures settle at $2.2160 a gallon.
NYMEX WTI Crude April futures settle at $67.04 a barrel, up 68 cents, 1.02%.
Norfolk Southern to present at J.P. Morgan Industrials. Executives to participate in fireside chat at 2025 conference.
news.summary: On March 7, 2025, in Atlanta, Norfolk Southern Corporation's Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, John Orr, along with Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Jason Zampi, are set to engage in a fireside chat at the 2025 J.P. Morgan Industrials event. Norfolk Southern Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NSC. This participation is significant as it will offer insights from the key executives of the corporation to industry experts and investors attending the event.

news.headline: Smith + Howard acquired Smith Kesler & Co. to expand into the Carolinas, solidifying expertise in construction accounting.
news.summary: Expanding its presence in construction accounting, Smith + Howard, a prominent tax, accounting, and advisory firm, has acquired Smith Kesler & Co. (SKC), a reputable accounting practice. The acquisition strengthens their expertise in this field and marks their entry into the Carolinas region. The announcement was made on February 11, 2025, in Atlanta. This strategic move is set to enhance their capabilities in serving clients and diversifying their offerings.

news.headline: Investor uncertainty leads to market indecision: Lovell.
US Treasury examining options for easing energy sanctions on Russia - Sources.
Apollo Group TV makes premium streaming more accessible in 2025 by adding credit card payments alongside Bitcoin.
news.summary: In Liverpool, England on March 7, 2025, Apollo Group TV has unveiled a new strategic collaboration aimed at enhancing accessibility to premium streaming services. This includes the introduction of credit card payments for the first time, a departure from the previous exclusive use of Bitcoin transactions. This transition is set to broaden the user base, offering more individuals the opportunity to securely enjoy premium streaming content.

news.headline: Stocks rise as Federal Reserve Chief Powell's positive economic outlook boosts Dow Jones and S&P 500, turning indexes positive.
news.summary: Following Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell's comments on Friday afternoon, the main stock market indexes shifted to positive territory. The Dow Jones and S&P 500 both saw improvements after Powell expressed that the economy is currently in a 'good place'. This update comes amidst a backdrop of live coverage tracking the latest market movements.

news.headline: Supreme Court of Virginia to consider $2.036 billion verdict against Pegasystems by Appian.
news.summary: McLean, Virginia - March 7, 2025 - Appian disclosed that the Supreme Court of Virginia has granted its request for a hearing to restore the $2.036 billion verdict against Pegasystems, Inc. The petition highlighted four discrepancies in the Court of...

news.headline: RealClean Aircraft, an aviation-exclusive detailing business, joins Franchise FastLane Portfolio, offering unique franchise opportunity.
news.summary: RealClean Aircraft, the pioneering aviation-exclusive detailing business in Omaha, Nebraska, made headlines on March 7, 2025. This franchise opportunity is creating a buzz as the first of its kind in the industry, focusing solely on aviation. RealClean Aircraft stands out for its specialization in cleaning and detailing general aircraft.

news.headline: Leasing begins at The Italic, a 50-story tower in Long Island City by American Lions. Expect quick lease-up after success of sister building.
news.summary: The Italic, a new property developed by American Lions which is a collaboration between Fetner Properties and Lions Group, is anticipated to fill up rapidly just like its counterpart, The Bold. Located in Long Island City, this development is projected to attract a significant number of tenants. The partnership has successfully managed to replicate the success of The Bold in their latest venture. The Italic is set to capitalize on the growing demand for housing in the area. This housing project is scheduled to be fully leased in a short period of time, showcasing the prowess of American Lions in the real estate market.

news.headline: Peter Schiff criticizes government investments in crypto as wasteful, diverting resources from real wealth creation.
news.summary: Peter Schiff, a prominent Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) critic, has criticized government investments in cryptocurrency, stating that any country holding digital assets is at a disadvantage. In a recent post, Schiff argued that directing public funds towards crypto takes away from actual wealth generation. He emphasized the negative impact of encouraging this diversion of resources, highlighting the availability of tokenized gold as a preferable alternative to fiat-backed crypto. Schiff's comments ignited a strong reaction, with one trader humorously proposing the creation of a "Schiff Coin." This suggestion was met with Schiff dismissing the idea.

news.headline: Trump's holding of Bitcoin falls short of expectations, causing a decline in the crypto market.
